notes: HP Indigo line uses Liquid Electrophotography (LEP) with ElectroInk liquid toner. HP Inc. as current legal entity dates to Nov 2015 split; 1939 founding retained per naming-lineage convention (same treatment as latex pilot).
Invented xerography (dry electrophotography). iGen and Versant lines use dry EA (Emulsion Aggregation) toner.
imagePRESS V line uses dry toner with Red VCSEL imaging. Canon acquired Oce (production print heritage) in 2010.
AccurioPress line uses dry Simitri V polymerised toner. Konica Minolta Inc. formed 2003 from Konica (1873) + Minolta (1928) merger; 2003 recorded as entity formation date.
Pro C line uses dry PxP polymerised chemical toner with a 4-drum electrostatic transfer system and VCSEL imaging.
